stories.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, claiming the company stole secret information about Apple's products and asked job candidates to bring unreleased Apple hardware to interviews.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and lawyers — it's a corporate dispute between two big tech companies. Nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
stories.simple_summary: Sam Altman (head of OpenAI) and Elon Musk are publicly arguing about whether space data centers are a good investment.
stories.why_it_matters: This is just wealthy executives arguing on social media — it doesn't affect your daily life or business.

stories.title: The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
stories.simple_summary: Apple is accusing OpenAI of trying to steal Apple's secret product designs by asking job applicants to bring unreleased prototypes to interviews.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a legal fight between two giant companies. It doesn't affect ordinary people or small business owners.

stories.title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
stories.simple_summary: An article raises a philosophical question about whether AI should help someone do something harmful (the headline example is deliberately extreme).
stories.why_it_matters: This is a thought experiment about AI ethics — interesting to think about but nothing that impacts you today.

stories.title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
stories.simple_summary: Anthropic (an AI company) is now letting people in India pay for their Claude AI assistant using Indian currency instead of U.S. dollars.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're in India and use Claude, you'll see prices in rupees instead of dollars, which makes it clearer what you're paying. Otherwise, this doesn't affect you.

stories.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
stories.simple_summary: Waze (a GPS and traffic app) is adding AI features to help you customize your driving routes and trips.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Waze to navigate, the app will get new features to personalize your experience, though you don't have to use them.

stories.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
stories.simple_summary: Google is adding AI-powered tools to the Waze driving app to let users customize their trips better.
stories.why_it_matters: Waze users may see new options to personalize their drives, but it's optional — you can use Waze as you always have.

stories.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
stories.simple_summary: Singer Lorde said she doesn't think smart glasses with AI cameras are attractive or appealing.
stories.why_it_matters: This is just a celebrity's personal opinion — it doesn't change anything about AI glasses or their availability.

stories.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
stories.simple_summary: Apple's attempt to build a self-driving car failed, but the powerful AI chips the company developed for it ended up making all Apple devices better at AI tasks.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use an iPhone or iPad, this explains why Apple's AI features work smoothly — the company learned how to build powerful chips even though the car project didn't succeed.

stories.title: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning
stories.simple_summary: Communities are starting to push back against big companies building huge data centers for AI because they use lots of electricity and water.
stories.why_it_matters: If you live near where a large data center might be built, this issue could affect your local community's power supply and water resources.

stories.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI is hiring someone to make ChatGPT easier for families, caregivers, and older adults to use.
stories.why_it_matters: OpenAI is working to make ChatGPT more accessible to older people and families, which could be helpful if you're interested in trying the tool.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.simple_summary: Instagram removed an AI feature that let people use public photos from others in creative projects, because many users complained about it.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, the app listened to complaints and removed a feature people didn't like — this shows the company paying attention to user feedback.
